reviews.review_description: Very excited about this app, great educational concept. However, the controllers are a bit wonky, the teleport feature for example, really doesn't work, it would be worth using the typical function of teleporting using the joystick as opposed to the trigger button. When changing scenes, the scene freezes which causes nausea as well. Otherwise, good concept. I hope they fix these issues soon.

I would like to point out that the games were designed for post-secondary science courses and can be played in French and English using the documents available on the site whose address is in the description. All movement in the games is done by teleportation. To teleport, you must point to the place where you want to teleport, when this area turns blue, press the trigger under the index finger and by releasing, you will teleport to the desired location (including, for example, the teleportation machine). First, you need to look around. Near the door, there is a terminal for swiping the magnetic card. Once the card is swiped, a large red button will appear.

reviews.review_title: We can’t get in the teleporter
reviews.review_description: I want to love this game. I have two enthusiastic kids, one of whom is fluent in French, and we can’t figure out how to get into the teleporter after opening the first door. There is nothing in the instructions. It just says move to the button by the door. What button?
This game genuinely incentivizes you to learn and helps communication skills as well! If you don't believe me, try it out!
